requirements.task_name: Save today’s Taurus daily horoscope and 2 top-rated related articles
requirements.task_description: Open today’s Taurus daily horoscope and add exactly 2 related articles with ratings of at least 4.0 stars to your reading list.

requirements.task_name: Bookmark the beginner tarot spread with more cards and ≤15 min reading time
requirements.task_description: Among the first two beginner tarot love spread guides, bookmark the guide that uses more cards while having an estimated reading time of 15 minutes or less. If both exceed 15 minutes, bookmark the one with the shorter time.

requirements.task_name: Create a ‘Capricorn Career’ collection with 3 weekly horoscopes for next month
requirements.task_description: Find weekly career horoscopes for Capricorn for the upcoming month and add exactly 3 different weekly articles into a new collection named “Capricorn Career”.

requirements.task_name: Favorite the top 3 highest-rated Mercury retrograde articles from the last 12 months
requirements.task_description: Search for ‘Mercury retrograde’, filter results to the last 12 months, sort by rating, and add the first 3 articles with ratings of at least 4.5 stars to your Favorites.

requirements.task_name: Configure content preferences with Libra sign, 5+ interests, and 70% tarot focus
requirements.task_description: Set content preferences so zodiac sign is Libra, follow at least 5 specified interests, content mix is 70% tarot / 30% astrology, and preference is for short articles.

requirements.task_name: Comment on a Leo–Aquarius compatibility article with ≥8 comments and ≤10 min reading time
requirements.task_description: Find a Leo–Aquarius compatibility article by sorting by most commented, choose one that has at least 8 comments and a reading time of 10 minutes or less, and post a specific comment.

requirements.task_name: Save a shortened journaling prompt for ‘The Tower’ tarot card to notes
requirements.task_description: Open the meaning page for ‘The Tower’ tarot card, take the first journaling prompt, shorten it to under 120 characters, and save it as a note using the on-site notes feature.

requirements.task_name: Schedule a ‘Full Moon in Aries’ ritual for October 28, 2023 at 9:00 PM in the ritual planner
requirements.task_description: Use the lunar calendar to find the ‘Full Moon in Aries’ ritual guide in October 2023 and add it to the site’s ritual planner on October 28, 2023 at 9:00 PM with a custom note.
